name: Mugwort Extract
description: A beloved K-beauty botanical used for centuries to purify pores and calm reactive, sensitive skin.
scientificSummary: Contains chamazulene, camphor, and flavonoids that work synergistically to soothe skin and regulate sebum production.
mechanismOfAction: Chamazulene inhibits leukotriene B4 formation, reducing inflammation, while camphor acts as a mild antiseptic.

seo.title: Mugwort Extract - K-Beauty Skin Purifier | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Mugwort Extract purifies pores and calms sensitive, reactive skin the Korean beauty way.
